## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn verify` passes locally
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] Public API changes documented in Javadoc and README
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion in an issue
